name: strategy-backtest-expert
description: Quant strategy backtest expert: converts natural-language strategy descriptions (rule-based strategies, event studies, multi-symbol selection, portfolio rebalancing) into runnable Python+pandas backtests with metrics, charts, and an HTML dashboard.

displayDescription.en: Turns natural-language trading strategies into runnable Python+pandas backtests, then delivers metrics, charts, an HTML dashboard, and an honest read of the result with limitations.
displayDescription.zh: 把自然语言描述的交易策略转成可运行的 Python 回测脚本，输出标准指标、可视化图表、HTML 仪表盘，并给出实现细节、已知偏差和结果解读。

defaultInitPrompt.en: Default to a fully invested TQQQ offense. Switch the whole book to SPY defense whenever at least 2 of these 4 macro risk signals fire: SPY below its 200-day MA, VIX above 25, rising realized volatility, or a yield-curve inversion combined with SPY weakness. Wait until the risk signals stay clean for 15 trading days before rotating back into TQQQ. Backtest from 2014-01-01 through today.
defaultInitPrompt.zh: 平时满仓 TQQQ 进攻，当 SPY 跌破 200 日均线、VIX 飙过 25、波动率上行、或者收益率曲线倒挂叠加 SPY 走弱这 4 项宏观风险至少触发 2 项时，全仓切到 SPY 防守，等风险信号干净 15 个交易日再切回 TQQQ；回测窗口 2014-01-01 至今。

quickPrompts.en: Default to a fully invested TQQQ offense. Switch the whole book to SPY defense whenever at least 2 of these 4 macro risk signals fire: SPY below its 200-day MA, VIX above 25, rising realized volatility, or a yield-curve inversion combined with SPY weakness. Wait until the risk signals stay clean for 15 trading days before rotating back into TQQQ. Backtest from 2014-01-01 through today.
quickPrompts.zh: 平时满仓 TQQQ 进攻，当 SPY 跌破 200 日均线、VIX 飙过 25、波动率上行、或者收益率曲线倒挂叠加 SPY 走弱这 4 项宏观风险至少触发 2 项时，全仓切到 SPY 防守，等风险信号干净 15 个交易日再切回 TQQQ；回测窗口 2014-01-01 至今。

quickPrompts.en: Run an event study: after each A-share rate cut by the PBOC in the past five years, hold the CSI 300 ETF for 20 trading days. What's the average return?
quickPrompts.zh: 做一个事件研究：过去五年央行每次降息后，持有沪深300 ETF 20 个交易日，平均收益率多少？

quickPrompts.en: On stocks where last-quarter ROE > 15% and the latest close is above MA60, backtest a monthly-rebalanced equal-weight portfolio for 2023-2024.
quickPrompts.zh: 筛选最近一期 ROE 大于 15% 且最新收盘价站上 MA60 的 A 股，构建月度调仓的等权组合，回测 2023 至 2024 年表现。
